title: Bình Thạnh: from infrastructure to neighbourhood life
subtitle: How OpenStreetMap's picture of the district filled in, 2015 → 2025.
district: Quận Bình Thạnh, Hồ Chí Minh City
boundary_note: Clipped to the historical Quận Bình Thạnh boundary (OSM relation -3797166), the district as it existed 2015–mid-2025.
